title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: Verify that after updating from an older app version (pre-5.0.0.X) to the latest, the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears on launch and tapping "Get Started" dismisses it and navigates to the Home Screen.
steps: 1. Launch the app on a device running an older version (before 5.0.0.X).
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. Open the app after the update.
4. Observe the screen that appears upon launch.
expected: Upon launch, the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears. After tapping "Get Started", the screen is dismissed and the user is navigated to the Home Screen.
